name: The Back Nine Golf | Troy, MI
address: 443 E Big Beaver Rd, Troy, MI 48083
about: The Back Nine Golf in Troy, MI is a golf simulator venue that focuses on providing a comprehensive golf experience. The facility offers multiple bays equipped with advanced simulator technology for year-round practice and play. It caters to both casual golfers looking for entertainment and serious players seeking to improve their game. Pricing and specific amenities details are currently unavailable on their website, suggesting a need for direct inquiry for current offers and services.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round golf simulation regardless of weather
Multi-bay layout for group play or individual practice
Focus on technology for an accurate playing experience

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The Back Nine Golf provides club rentals, so you can play without your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and kitchen on-site. Their food and drink policy for outside items is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes on a simulator typically takes about 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Back Nine Golf welcomes families, but specific amenities or programs for children are not detailed on their website.
